meta.source_note: Steam 公开搜索页提供发售日期而非小时级发布时间；本报告按发售日期从新到旧选取最新条目。

items.title: Gods' Gate Demo
items.short_description: Gods' Gate is a relentless isometric shooter where elite operatives plunge through ancient portals into procedurally generated mythological hellscapes. Survive escalating hordes, and extract before the Gate seals—leaving you trapped with the gods who want you dead. Solo or 4-player co-op.

items.title: 夜班护士模拟器 Demo
items.short_description: 在这款心理恐怖护士模拟器中存活30天。在执行日常医疗任务与严格的时间管理之间寻找平衡，同时躲避潜伏在黑暗病房中的恐怖异常。赚取薪水，控制你不断下降的理智值，在成为医院的下一个永久病人之前拼死逃离。

items.title: PNG BATTLE
items.short_description: 某一天，有人突发奇想。 "霸王龙和有智慧的自卸卡车打架，谁会赢？" 你那些荒诞又伟大的幻想，我们统统帮你实现。"PNG BATTLE"

items.title: Forge Clicker 2 Demo
items.short_description: Forge Clicker 2 is a pixel art idle clicker game where you manage your own forge. Tap to gather materials, craft weapons through a forging minigame, sell your creations, and unlock stronger materials, upgrades, and new blades.

items.title: oooÖ
items.short_description: 《oooÖ》是一款闯关冒险解谜游戏。你将从死亡中醒来，化身为一只独特的毛毛虫。 探索趣味关卡，体会倒霉小夫的遭遇，是黄泉路上走一趟还是重生校园奇遇！ 你一无所知，但本能告诉你——逃离这里！

items.title: 妖刀传 Demo
items.short_description: 妖刀现，血雨落…… 人人都知道的童谣传唱了百年， 而如今，妖星祸起，妖刀于名剑会现身…… 这摄人心魄的嗜血之刃，又将掀起何等的腥风血雨呢？

items.title: Pixmox
items.short_description: A strategic Match-3 puzzle where collected pets fight for you. Build combos, charge powerful skills, upgrade your team, and conquer fantasy battles through smart tactical decisions.

items.title: Wall Brawl Demo
items.short_description: Hold the line! Team up in this tactical multiplayer castle‑brawler where players raise fortresses, set up defenses, and smash through enemy strongholds with physics‑driven destruction. Heroic last stands! Questionable tactics! Bricks moving at unsafe speeds!

items.title: Who Clicked My Bones Demo
items.short_description: Who Clicked My Bones? is short Incremental Game about ruling a massive amount of skeleton army to sacrifice in order to Summon Lich King. Upgrade your skeleton in Skill Tree. The Game is designed to be finished in 4 hour playtime.

items.title: Whale Cleaner Demo
items.short_description: 准备好迎接海底最硬核的保洁工作了吗？接管深海清洗站，为脏兮兮的鲸鱼、海豚和其他神秘巨兽提供终极清洁服务！在这款极度解压且充满氛围感的清洁模拟游戏中，你需要使用贝壳刮刀、海绵等奇特工具，清理厚重的淤泥、远古海藻和危险的水母。收集隐藏在污垢中的红宝石蟹来升级装备。顶住黑心资本家“钳老板”的压力，努力将客户洗得闪闪发光！沉浸在独特的生物工业世界里，洗净千年的污垢，发掘意想不到的深海秘宝。

items.title: 哇咔纳传说
items.short_description: 《哇咔纳传说》是一款充满奇幻与挑战的童话风动作冒险游戏，带你踏入神秘广阔的童话大陆。在这里你将面对各种各样的怪物和场景，灵活运用你的魔法技能来对抗这些敌人。最终在追寻生命的真谛、家庭纽带和自我认知的探索中，收获独一无二的心灵体验。

items.title: Aaron Drake: Ace Detective Demo
items.short_description: Become Aaron Drake and experience the thrill of the hunt as you interrogate suspects, spot contradictions, and corner killers across three murder cases — alongside a rookie partner who is trying her very best.

items.title: Woke Up In a Dark Nightmare Demo
items.short_description: You fell asleep in your own bed but woke up in a dark nightmare. Explore a shifting house haunted by paranormal activity, uncover disturbing secrets and uncover the truth behind your arrival.

items.title: BURNTCRUST Demo
items.short_description: Drive across randomly generated galaxies, deliver pizza, upgrade your ship, and plan your route to avoid hostiles. Or get drunk, gamble away your life savings, and crash full speed into an asteroid field. I won't judge.

items.title: ReStory: Chill Electronic Repairs Demo
items.short_description: 在2005年左右的东京开一间古朴的电子产品维修店，通过认真修复标志性的电子游戏主机、手机、音乐播放器及其他怀旧设备来扩大经营。与顾客交谈，聆听他们的故事，见证你的决定将如何影响他们的人生以及你的店铺的发展。

items.title: The Adventure of Spyke Demo
items.short_description: Join Spyke where the worst day of his life suddenly takes a turn and becomes an epic adventure. Solve challenging puzzles, use mystical tools, and fight robots, venom-spitting organ harvesters, terrifying creatures, and much more in this low-poly, top-down, action RPG puzzler.

items.title: Neko Station Demo
items.short_description: 《猫咪列车长》是一款 2D 像素风的暖心系桌面放置游戏，让你的屏幕化身为会动的超可爱猫咪乐园！

items.title: 我的修仙日志 Cultivation Journal
items.short_description: 《我的修仙日志》是一款融合了文字MUD美学与深度修仙模拟的挂机游戏。你将扮演一介凡人，从炼气期踏上漫漫仙途，在挂机中积累修为、炼制丹药、锻造法宝，在心魔幻境中突破境界，最终渡劫飞升。游戏拥有超过数百段心魔叙事的突破系统、百余本可参悟的功法、完善的炼丹炼器体系，以及独创的“修仙书架”功能——让你在修炼之余，读一本小说，静待道成。

items.title: PS Maker Demo
items.short_description: Create 2D top-down story-driven exploration games without writing any code! PS Maker lets you build maps, add characters, write dialogue, set up puzzles, and trigger cutscenes to tell your story. Once it's ready, share your games instantly with friends!

items.title: Dungeons & Animals Demo
items.short_description: Dive into dungeons in a 1–6 player co-op souls-like experience, gather resources, craft powerful gear, and survive in a world where risk determines everything.

items.title: snaze Demo
items.short_description: Snaze is a snake game. Eat the green dots and go to next level.

items.title: Light From Within Demo
items.short_description: Light From Within is a top-down action-adventure focused on exploration, dungeon crawling, and discovery. Traverse a handcrafted world, solve puzzles, uncover hidden paths, and collect relics that expand your abilities, boost your stats, and alter how you interact with the environment.

items.title: 放置模拟国
items.short_description: 《放置模拟国》是一款国家模拟类放置游戏，您可以轻松的获得各类资源，并使用获得的资源进行国家养成，最后实现统一天下的目的。

items.title: Royal Signal : The Prince’s 5 Days Demo
items.short_description: Four princesses gather before the Crown Prince of the mightiest kingdom — you. Wield your royal gift — Telepathy — to peer into their hidden hearts. Behind every dazzling smile, each princess hides her own truth. Five days. See past the masks and choose the one to stand by your side.

items.title: RAX
items.short_description: RAX 是一款关于光路、逻辑与模块化构建的益智沙盒游戏。放置并旋转不同光学元件，控制光线的方向、颜色和时序，点亮目标，并将复杂结构封装成可复用的蓝图芯片。 这是一款基于网格的逻辑解谜游戏，核心操作是选择、放置、旋转和组合光学元件。玩家通过反射、分光、合色、延迟、阻断和条件触发来构建稳定的光路。随着谜题推进，游戏从直观的路径规划逐渐扩展到信号时序、状态保持和芯片封装，主要吸引力在于用简单规则搭建出复杂而可复用的系统。

items.title: 盛夏离与合 试用版
items.short_description: 毕业自驾游？不，是「心动修罗场」！ 《盛夏离与合》是现象级互动影像系列《完蛋！我被美女包围了！》IP的全新篇章。本次我们将填补“完蛋宇宙”时间线上的关键一块，带你回到那个承前启后、充满无限可能的毕业季，体验一段关于成长、抉择与命运交织的动人故事。 这段承前启后的夏日篇章，都会因你每一次的抉择，导向独一无二的盛夏结局。

items.title: 真弓-Mayumi-
items.short_description: This is a Japanese horror game that features a woman who works at a hospital as the main character.

items.title: The Big Owl Night
items.short_description: Survive a chaotic night in São Paulo with zombies, bosses and cursed upgrades in a fast-paced top-down roguelite. Collect weapons, trigger strange synergies, visit odd merchants and fight until the Big Owl lets you see another sunrise.

items.title: Gingerbread Wonderland Demo
items.short_description: Decorate your own gingerbread cookies, and organize your scene. And share it with your friends. How about making my own scene this Christmas ?

items.title: 玛丽编辑器
items.short_description: 一款功能强大的玛丽机主题编辑器与游戏平台，让您自由定制主题图标、配色、音效与玩法规则，打造专属的街机体验。

items.title: Volcano Logistics Demo
items.short_description: 一款令人满足的第一人称渐进式物理游戏，玩家需经营废弃物处理厂，并为饥饿的火山提供燃料。赚取灵魂球并解锁地狱级升级。扩展你的平台，焚烧并摧毁各类物体。为恶魔上司效力，并揭开可疑货物背后的黑暗真相

items.title: 灰度决策 Demo
items.short_description: 程序员救下一名老道，获得残破古籍《万符真解》。你惊讶发现——制符和开发软件一样，不过是平衡各项参数。于是你开了家“赛博符箓”公司，研发数字灵符，在道德与暴利之间反复横跳。 是坚守正道，还是拥抱灰色？每一次选择，都将改变公司的命运。

items.title: 黑帆王座·Galactic Loadout Demo
items.short_description: 在《黑帆王座·Galactic Loadout》中，堆叠离谱联武器，赌出逆天搭配，让战舰战力无限膨胀。每一次选择都在失控边缘狂飙——直到你碾碎整片星海。

items.title: Gastova: The Witches of Arkana
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 22 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《女巫史诗》是一款轻松愉快的2D平台冒险遊戏。作为阿尔卡那的守护魔女，加斯托娃必须维持魔法的平衡、解开与泉源守护者相关的谜团、揭开隐藏的真相，并在为时已晚之前，从邪恶势力手中守护这个世界的未来……

items.title: Hunt And Peck Demo
items.short_description: Turn your index fingers into the brave Eagle Brothers! 'Hunt & Peck' is a typing defense game where you don't type words—you strike keys. Smash the specific keys where enemies appear with speed and precision to defend the cyber world.

items.title: 桌面蚂蚁 Demo
items.short_description: 在电脑桌面模拟喂养蚂蚁，搬运食物。还原现实中观察蚂蚁的体验，还可以投喂不同食物以及使用各种道具捉弄它们。平时它们在屏幕上四处觅食，时刻陪伴你并且不会影响你的工作。

items.title: Toxic Trains Demo
items.short_description: Toxic Trains is a strategy simulation game about optimizing rail routes. Build tracks to transport passenger and freight trains to their destinations. Choose upgrades to modify the land and your network. Switch tracks to avoid collisions and spills. Can you keep the trains from exploding?

items.title: Slice To Meet You Demo
items.short_description: A cozy idle incremental game about the satisfying rhythm of chopping ingredients. Unlock new produce, upgrade your knives, and grow your earnings — all at your own pace, with no pressure and no timers.

items.title: ALARIC
items.short_description: May your wrath conquer the cursed beings and save the land. Fight like hell and avenge your father. Explore a giant castle filled with monsters and get stronger to withstand the forces of hell in this boomershooter, metroidvania adventure.

items.title: Idle Knight
items.short_description: Idle Knight turns every click, keystroke, and controller input into XP. Level up your warrior, build your stats, fight in ranked duels, conquer dungeons, join guilds, and crush seasonal events all from your desktop.

items.title: Good Hands Demo
items.short_description: In Good Hands, join Nia as she helps her neighbor Aunty Zubeida tidy up a tangled garden. Tend, sort, and restore calm in this cozy puzzle about care and connection. Unwind with uniquely crafted puzzles, made for anyone who finds joy in gardens.

items.title: Life in Tudorofka
items.short_description: Life in Tudorofka is a game where you, find a rusty broken junk, restore the junk, buy parts for the junk, build your car, work and enjoy your life at country

items.title: My Donut
items.short_description: Unleash your imagination in a world of sweets! Create your dream donuts from shaping the dough to decorating with colorful toppings. Experience a relaxing creative journey focused on making and sharing your unique masterpieces.

items.title: The Wild Demo
items.short_description: Step into the wild, the untamed world of Earth, where you'll take control of a wide variety of animals. Survive the harsh environment, hunt, forage, breed and fight through an ever changing ecosystem.

items.title: Broken Crown
items.short_description: Broken Crown is a fantasy RTS where you build a settlement, gather resources, research powerful upgrades, and command hundreds of units in formation-based battles. Advance troops through five visual tiers, preserve Bronze-to-Gold veterans, and conquer tactical maps shaped by Fog of War.

items.title: Mage Madness Demo
items.short_description: Mage Madness is a first person multiplayer party game where mages compete in spell-fueled minigames. Cast spells, duke it out in chaotic minigames, and settle grudges. Play quick rounds in Playlist Mode or go all in with Block Party where every point earned earned fuels your power.

items.title: Echoes In Static Demo
items.short_description: An animatronic horror experience

items.title: Endless Roll Demo
items.short_description: Your dice are your health in this endless survival roguelite. Pick a lane, manage wounds and corruption, draft omens, climb the leaderboard, and push for one more floor.

items.title: Elacoria Demo
items.short_description: Explore an endless open world — vast in width, length, and depth — filled with mysteries to uncover. Join up to 8 friends to survive, farm, mine, build, and fight together in a living world with day-night cycles, seasons, and dynamic weather.

items.title: Stone to Stove Demo
items.short_description: 白天收集资源，服务他人赚取金钱；夜晚购买防御塔，保卫基地。优化你的定居点，承担风险以获取更多利润，每天抵御日益艰难的攻击，这将为你带来丰厚的回报。

items.title: Planet Arcade Demo
items.short_description: A light-hearted, casual adventure game in the style of a retro RPG. In place of traditional battles, key plot points are advanced through minigames, some of which are stylistic tributes to classic arcade games.

items.title: Autotelic
items.short_description: one may use an array of tools and items to complete obstacle courses, and one may also talk to various characters to amass useless information.

items.title: Shoot Until You Rest Demo
items.short_description: Shoot Until You Rest is an arena-shooter rogue-lite where you can choose from a large range of weapons and other gear to fight your enemies. Survive waves, fight powerfull bosses and get rewarded with new upgrades and characters(yes you can play the bosses).

items.title: Schedule Store Simulator Demo
items.short_description: 从小毒贩一路崛起为令人畏惧的毒枭，在 Hyland Point 的黑暗地下世界中制造并分销毒品。 通过购置物业、经营业务、雇佣员工并掌控街头来壮大你的帝国。

items.title: Play and Learn English
items.short_description: 先让你开口说,再让你说得更好。仅用1000个单词,让你的日常英语流利起来。在故事驱动的RPG中,麦克风与你同在,游戏会倾听。完全离线,无订阅。

items.title: 《美少女旅馆：可爱即是正义，但正义需要处刑》
items.short_description: 一间神秘的旅馆，一群彼此怀疑的美少女，一场无法停止的猎杀游戏。在谎言与处刑之间，找出真正的狼人，每一个选择，都会改写她们的结局。

items.title: lone.AI Demo
items.short_description: lone.AI is a space RPG roguelite. With challenging, relentless gameplay, each run has the potential to boost your ship's power, speed, and more. As a lone AI, fight your way through the solar system and uncover the secret behind the ZOSMA, an alien race that holds power over the system.

items.title: With A Heavy Heart Demo
items.short_description: A cozy 2D platformer on what it means to truly live, laugh, learn, and lift someone up

items.title: Watamari Part2 - A Fake Marriage? Demo
items.short_description: 化身“恋之天使”，引导少女们走向爱情的百合游戏。 在悉心照料主人的身心之余，倾听她们的心声，推动故事前进。 加油吧，小天使——你的选择，或许将改变她们的命运。

items.title: Sneaky Bimbuls
items.short_description: One team hides among a crowd of NPCs. The other has to figure out who's a player before the map gets sabotaged. A chaotic local party game for 2-8 players on a shared screen.

items.title: 五七之桐：通向首相之路 Demo
items.short_description: 这是一款以经济泡沫破裂后的大不况事件为背景的政治模拟文字冒险游戏。您将扮演新当选的县知事折木一马，在故事中利用有限的预算解决县内经济、安全与福祉的诸多问题，并妥善处理议会政党与政府成员间的关系。最终一步步迈向总理大臣的宝座。

items.title: Eightfold Blocks Demo
items.short_description: Rotate, place, and rethink every block in a focused 8x8 puzzle game. Solve 1,000 spatial boards, keep finished solutions visible, reset freely, and use optional hints when one stubborn piece refuses to fit.

items.title: SkateFPS Demo
items.short_description: When the system hates you, hate the system! Experimental FPS about shooting magic from your hands with a skateboard + text adventure with multiple endings about being cursed in your own land.

items.title: 蒙古之岚 剧本1：崇正学堂篇 Demo
items.short_description: 内蒙古喀喇沁的崇正学堂，1900年代。在真实历史人物交错的校园里，通过累积少女萨仁的选择见证五段真结局——一部史实视觉小说。收录约 7 万字剧本、30项成就、传统蒙古文竖排显示。

items.title: ArmOut
items.short_description: ArmOut is an old slot machine. It just sits there doing nothing... However, it might spin whenever you press a key with chosen amount of credits. Punch that keyboard to earn those credits!!!

items.title: Welcome Demon Demo
items.short_description: You killed the last Warden. Now his chair is yours. For 666 hours, judge demons, expose their lies, read the Warden’s book, and place each soul in the right dungeon before Chaos consumes the prison.

items.title: Backburner
items.short_description: Cook, serve, and manage your food truck while exploring a handcrafted open world. Upgrade your equipment, unlock new recipes, and turn your small food truck into a thriving business.

items.title: Break The Chain
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 14 篇用户评测中有 42% 为好评。
items.short_description: You are bound by a chain — every step matters. Break the Chain is a physics-based solo and co-op puzzle game where precision, timing, and teamwork are everything. One mistake can pull everyone down. Fall, restart, and fight your way to freedom.

items.title: The Crimson Contract Demo
items.short_description: Every contract pays. Some cost what’s left of your humanity.

items.title: Bit Mine Clicker
items.short_description: Bit-Mine Clicker is an incremental mining game where you click to earn BIT, build automatic miners, upgrade your grid, react to changing market prices, and defend your base. Catch helpful bonuses, avoid dangerous traps, unlock talents, and turn a single coin into a powerful BIT empire

items.title: A DAY TO REMEMBER
items.short_description: Play as aino, she has secret feelings for her childhood friend name Rain, can she possibly confess her feelings to rain before the day ends or will it be to late and will she lose her childhood friend Rain forever?

items.title: Birds of War Demo
items.short_description: You are a bird. You have a nest. Other birds want your eggs. Birds of War is a team-based aerial PvP game. Raid nests, steal eggs, fight beak-to-beak in fast, chaotic matches built around flight and combat. Your mic is always hot. Your enemies can hear you. Plan accordingly.

items.title: More Deaths, More Fun (Lie) Demo
items.short_description: More Deaths, More Fun (Lie) is a brutal 2D platformer where every death makes the game harder. Face evolving levels, precise challenges, and climb the global leaderboard. Fail fast, adapt faster - or lose your sanity trying.

items.title: Echo Core Demo
items.short_description: Fight the machines. Survive the ruins. Uncover the truth. Echo Core is a top-down sci-fi action-adventure where you awaken in a forgotten underground facility. Explore awe-inducing locations, battle hostile machines, and uncover the truth of this place across chapters.

items.title: LampMan! Demo
items.short_description: LampMan! is a 2d action-platformer featuring three playable characters you can switch between at any time. Master their abilities, conquer vibrant levels, and restore light to LampWorld!

items.title: Eternal Exodus
items.short_description: 一款以来世为舞台的捕怪 RPG。在这场探讨深刻哲学与形而上学主题的剧情向冒险中，捕捉并融合神话生物，踏上将来世从暴政统治中解放出来的旅程。

items.title: The Refuge Demo
items.short_description: Serve the A.R.C organization. Infiltrate infested zones, complete contracts, and extract with your resources. Upgrade your facilities and complete quests to unlock new services. An intense PvE extraction where the difficulty increases with your ambitions.

items.title: KAON : Fragmented Core Demo
items.short_description: KAON: Fragmented Core is a 2D action-platformer with a metroidvania feel. You play as Kaon, an android awakened in a world where no one lives anymore, neither humans nor animals. Mostly what’s left is plants, ruins, and robots, a good chunk of them turned hostile

items.title: Aghia Demo
items.short_description: The Dark Voievode has unleashed his beasts to violate your homeland. Eradicate these creatures from the face of the Earth as you make your way across the country in this ’90s-inspired FPS.

items.title: Cheese Stack
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 10 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: Cheese Stack is a cozy puzzle game where you need to arrange falling pieces of cheese into perfect rows. Simple rules, delicious graphics, upbeat music, and a highscore table you'll be tempted to beat. It's the perfect way to unwind for 5 minutes or get lost in the game for an hour.

items.title: 1 AM MOSCOW TIME Demo
items.short_description: A 2D adventure about rescuing magical creatures in Moscow and the role of a design bureau employee in this whole story.

items.title: Clawless Coin Demo
items.short_description: 经营您自己的抓娃娃机帝国，收集奖杯毛绒玩具，解锁升级，并在这款温馨的街机放置游戏中获得声望以赚取巨额利润。

items.title: 暗神话:露西 Demo
items.short_description: 中世纪一处废弃城市出现了很多变异僵尸,之前军队在这里研发过毒气.上级怕僵尸入侵到周边的城市,所以派露西过来探查情况,最好能够消灭所有变异僵尸.上级给了露西6把高科技武器,但这里的僵尸实在太多了,露西可能需要在这里呆很久,准备好,任务开始!

items.title: Please, Spin Demo
items.short_description: 在这款赌上性命的“命运轮盘”Roguelike游戏中，转动轮盘决定生死！自定义你的轮盘，搜寻能打破游戏平衡的遗物，在疯狂的小游戏中求生。智取暗箱操作的Boss，击败疯狂的主持人，活着逃离这场死亡直播！

items.title: Kick Demo
items.short_description: 《Kick》是一段充满怀旧情怀的旅程，你在上学的路上不断磨练自己的足球技巧，穿越充满独特挑战的关卡。你准备好大显身手了吗？

items.title: The Calling Past. Demo
items.short_description: 杰布生活艰难，决定回到故乡。想在亲友身边逃避坏念头，却开始做噩梦——不仅睡梦中，醒来也纠缠他。找到并了解杰布噩梦的源头。

items.title: Football Pitch And Arcade Simulator Demo
items.short_description: 经营您自己的五人制足球场和街机中心！升级设施，吸引顾客，打造您的娱乐帝国。

items.title: Arcany Demo
items.short_description: Arcany is a cozy persistent online world set in the mysterious Realm of Gravenmoor. Train skills, explore a magical land, craft powerful items, and uncover the story behind the forgotten cataclysme.

items.title: Nekopedia: Find Her Tail Demo
items.short_description: 与猫娘们一起踏上旅程，在温馨多彩的地点寻找隐藏的猫咪。阅读猫娘百科，与她们交谈，深入了解猫娘及其种类，也许会发现超出你预期的事情。每位猫娘都有自己独特的魅力和个人故事。

items.title: 炼金秘术 Demo
items.short_description: 疯狂与理智、虚幻与现实、愚昧与进步。这些力量交织在一片长期被迷信笼罩的土地之上。在这款解密游戏中，坚定对科学的敬畏，保持自己的人性——因为当最后的星光也隐去后，黑暗与绝望会重新成为这片土地的主人。

items.title: A.V.E.N.A Demo
items.short_description: Pilot disposable combat drones through the Primal Portal in a sci-fi action roguelike. Customize your drone, fight through various missions, recover research data and alien technology to enhance your drone setup for the next session.

items.title: FLESHBREAK Demo
items.short_description: A story-driven survival visual novel inspired by SCP-610. Face a flesh-spreading outbreak, make brutal moral choices, protect the people you can’t let go of, and uncover the terrifying truth behind the disease.

items.title: Vermin Protocol - Demo
items.short_description: Take on pest control contracts and hunt infestations across abandoned warehouses, barns, and other contaminated locations Track, eliminate, and contain the vermin before they spread.

items.title: bang shoot demo.
items.short_description: A fast-paced arena shooter where you wield two weapons at once across unique battlegrounds. Each round is different: new map, teams, weapons, and modifiers.

items.title: Beerhouse Simulator Demo
items.short_description: 第一人称家庭酵造模拟器，每一批次都可能精彩地失败或出人意料地成功——嗝的人或许会注意到其中的差异，也或许不会。酵造、实验，或者就此展开一届啊啊大乱。

items.title: SNAP JAW Demo
items.short_description: A thrilling rogue-lite horror fishing experience. Pillage the sea, upgrade your boat, and FEED the increasingly hungry colossal-mechatronic creatures of the deep. All in an attempt to reverse the rapture of your adorable dog Jeremiah.

items.title: Loot List: 小偷模拟器 — DEMO
items.short_description: 《Loot List》是一款以劫盗为主题的盗窃模拟及动作游戏。但有一点不同——在这款游戏中，盗窃行动必须有一份清单。

items.title: PICK A BOO Demo
items.short_description: PICK A BOO是一款用磁力吸附家具并进行搬运的线上合作动作游戏。

items.title: Reapers Reception Demo
items.short_description: Manage a hotel for criminals, spot anomalies, and find out who killed your sister 15 years ago.

items.title: Neofold Lite
items.short_description: 一款无限生物收集游戏，每只生物都由你的GPU实时生成，独一无二。孵化无穷无尽的奇妙物种，收养你喜爱的那些，在桌面上培育一个只属于你的活力生态园。

items.title: Deepscape Inc. Demo
items.short_description: A 2 to 4 player co-op horror game. You wake up marked with an ID number you can't see on your own back. Only your fellow inmates can read it. Find each other, share your numbers, reach your validation rooms, and get out before whatever roams the halls finds you first.

items.title: Empire Eleven 2026 Demo
items.short_description: Build your football empire. Scout talent, manage finances, develop tactics and lead your club from obscurity to glory in a deep football management simulation.

items.title: CyberSushi Demo
items.short_description: 体验 CyberSushi 的精炼试玩篇：这是一款高速街机 roguelite，小小寿司英雄冲过崩塌维度，延续连击，积满 Sushi Surge，选择改变本局节奏的 Sushi Hacks，再追一次不可能的挑战。

items.title: Ghostslayers Demo
items.short_description: Ghostslayers is a wave-based top-down coop shooter where you slay the ghosts with magic and couple thousands of bullets... Or punches, or slashes, or explosions. Use the varied weaponry, spell cards and abilities, combine them together and obliterate absolutely everything.

items.title: Estancia Protocol Zero Demo
items.short_description: A first-person survival horror set in Neuquén, Argentine Patagonia. Venture into a remote estate in Cerro Ocaso to search for your missing partner. Face hordes of the undead, manage your resources, and solve classic puzzles to survive the nightmare.

items.title: MOLOKAUST Demo
items.short_description: 在这款第一人称生存恐怖游戏中，深入一个残酷的被诅咒的小镇。凭借超写实的氛围和极端的生存机制，你必须合理分配你的物资，直面你最糟糕的梦魇，以拯救你的妻子和女儿。

items.title: Taxi Simulator (Demo)
items.short_description: Jump into the Taxi Simulator Demo! Drive a classic yellow cab through a vibrant city district. Complete your first missions, refuel, clean up your ride, and avoid traffic tickets. Experience the shady, wild life of a streetwise cabby. Your shift starts now!

items.title: Outrange Strike Demo
items.short_description: 《Outrange Strike》是一款逼真的空战游戏。驾驶战斗机，控制能量和迎角，发射导弹，并躲避诱饵攻击！

items.title: DODGEBRAWL Demo
items.short_description: An FPS reimagining of the best gym class sport, DODGEBRAWL is a transformation of iconic shooter game modes into the context of an athletic activity. Play for free today!

items.title: Tiny Train Adventures Demo
items.short_description: Set off on a tiny train adventure! Build your railway and drive through the mountains in this cozy exploration adventure.

items.title: Drained Creatures Demo
items.short_description: Drained Creatures is a multiplayer 3D arena brawler for up to 8 players locally, playable using gamepads only.

items.title: Increment Isle Demo
items.short_description: Increment Isle is an incremental game about plundering a mysterious island. Destroy everything, discover new resources, strategically buy upgrades and avoid scurvy to become the richest person in the universe!

items.title: Ironfall Demo
items.short_description: Ironfall is a high-octane Action Roguelite where medieval steel meets futuristic firepower. Mow down thousands of mechanical demons, collect powerful loot, and craft unique builds in a world of burning metal. Can you survive the descent and reclaim the shattered fortress?

items.title: Order of the Sinking Star Demo
items.short_description: 由《时空幻境》与《见证者》制作人 Jonathan Blow 领衔打造，《沉星之序》是一款以魔法与谜团交织世界为背景的解谜冒险游戏。破解环环相扣的手工设计谜题，发现各具特色的可操作英雄，掌握不断演化的游戏机制，并逐步揭开隐藏于世界背后的宏大谜团。立即体验 Demo！

items.title: Bato Battō - Demo
items.short_description: Bato Battō is an online multiplayer 3D platform-fighter. Each weapon has a unique move list. Fight in every direction with weighted & athletic movement, and multi-chain combos using stylized physics. Demo modes - Free for all & Team slayer. Release to include CTF, King of the Hill, Race & more

items.title: Cave Clicker Demo
items.short_description: Mine rocks to collect rare ores to become the richest Mole alive, and looking good while doing it too!

items.title: All Hallows Demo
items.short_description: Survive a shifting, brutalist nightmare. In this high-fidelity psychological horror demo, manage a systemic economy of decay as you navigate the Ithris Cemetery. Explore, adapt, and confront an evolving threat tailored to your personal fear profile. Can you anchor your reality?

items.title: Banban Isle Rangers Demo
items.short_description: 跟随班班和他的朋友们，踏入一个充满32位辉煌的奇幻世界！与你那位超棒的新飞行伙伴一起探索班班群岛的独特土地，帮助朋友们解决问题，并拯救你的暑假！……哦，对了，大概还要拯救世界，免遭“淘气鬼”的入侵。

items.title: CHUNKS Demo
items.short_description: Once you start, you won’t be able to stop! Mine entire galaxies dry, blast through hazards, and craft insane machines to dominate every session.

items.title: 艾恩葛朗特 回荡新声 DEMO Version
items.short_description: Step into Aincrad, a world of beauty and danger where every battle could be your last. This Demo version allows you to play the Beta Test chapter. Save data from the demo can be carried over to the full version.

items.title: Rebel's Ascent Demo
items.short_description: Defeat waves of enemies using everything from sticks to exploding throwing axe. Rebel's Ascent is an incremental roguelite RPG where you acquire and upgrade weapons, improve skills, and fight your way to freedom.

items.title: LarsGadiel Demo
items.short_description: LarsGadiel is the prequel to Xenon Valkyrie, a game originally created for Nintendo's 8-bit console that was never released (at least for now), but is now coming to Steam. It's a classic Metroidvania, featuring the original maps and design from that era.

items.title: Fiets-Together Demo
items.short_description: Fiets-Together is a chaotic co-op racing game in which 2-4 players control a bicycle together. Each player controls one shoe on a pedal, together you accelerate and steer the bike. The goal is to chase best times, unlock customizations, and keep your friendship.

items.title: Water You Doing? Demo
items.short_description: 你们的座驾抛锚了，前方还有恶浪等着！在一艘霉味冲天的破船上，展开彻底失控的混乱合作。收集废料、堵住漏水、用渔获换冰啤酒，再用鱼叉打破物理法则！

items.title: Melted Time Demo
items.short_description: Candle, your path is full of puzzles. Can you handle it? Hurry, your time is already melting away.

items.title: Root Scourge Demo
items.short_description: An open world crafting game where surface is occupied by a mutated plant species. Humanity has been exiled and is living under the surface for hundreds of years. You are one of the few professionals that can roam the surface. As a mercenary, you take on jobs and face the root scourge on surface.

items.title: 心动发条 试玩版
items.short_description: "为了拯救你，我重复了数千次死亡。" 生日那天收到的告白信，竟变成了死亡预告函。 在这部无限流悬疑恋爱视觉小说中，你将使用“回溯之戒”，在不断循环的一天里揭开杀人魔“X”的真面目。 阻止注定的悲剧，改写你的命运吧。

items.title: Nomad Drive Demo
items.short_description: 修复您破旧的房车，单人或1–3人合作驶向程序生成的末日后世界。收集资源，定制您的房车，并尽可能长时间生存。

items.title: A Hard Game About Reaching Valhalla Demo
items.short_description: Swing your axe, master momentum and overcome impossible obstacles on your journey to Valhalla, alone or with your friends

items.title: Lost in Art Demo
items.short_description: Explore a surreal, twisted version of real-world art gallery in this atmospheric puzzle adventure inspired by classic survival horror. Use creative thinking and a mysterious power to solve puzzles, evade a sinister threat, and uncover the secret of a cursed artwork; before it traps you for good.

items.title: Broom Racer Demo
items.short_description: Broom Racer is a first person, multiplayer party racing game on flying brooms. Race your friends or players world wide through mountains, tight tunnels, forests and more. Fly risky maneuvers to gain a speed boost but don't fall of your broom!

items.title: Bladebound Demo
items.short_description: 使用一个角色在不同战斗风格之间切换，与怪物战斗。在每次冒险中收集物品，塑造你的背包，构建你的流派，并通过单人或与好友合作来制定策略。每一个选择决定你的力量，每一局挑战你的技巧。

items.title: Miniature Painter Simulator Demo
items.short_description: 开始这个令人惊叹的微型画画爱好吧！ 经营自己的在线商店，出售你画的迷你模型，并处理客户的各种订单。 创建最惊人的微型模型，几乎没有限制，甚至可以导入你自己的自定义模型！ 坐下，拿起画笔，放松一下。

items.title: Truck-kun is Supporting Me from Another World?! Demo
items.short_description: 你的卡车拥有魔力，而你现在还欠着一笔灵魂债，债主是一个肌肉发达的异世界精灵女孩，住在你的脑子里。化身“卡车君”碾压路人、送货上门并击败骷髅王，在两个世界之间自由穿梭，一切尽在这款混乱的单局制动漫风驾驶游戏！

items.title: Ripper Demo
items.short_description: Ripper is a top-down shooter with fully destructible environments, fog of war, and Steam multiplayer. Break through walls, survive enemy waves, and battle your friends.

items.title: 無人島哪有這麼爽 Demo
items.short_description: 全实景拍摄，金钟团队倾力打造影视级规格体验，新生代潜力演员联手飙戏！！你将与四位风格迥异的美女展开难忘冒险，每次选择都可能改变命运。失去记忆的你意外觉醒神秘能力，让岛上的生活充满惊喜。这不只是求生，而是一场浪漫又甜蜜的旅程，再加上创新的沉浸式陪伴系统，让你忍不住喊出：《无人岛哪有这么爽》？！

items.title: Ashes of Darkness Demo
items.short_description: Ashes of Darkness 是一款设定在黑暗中世纪世界中的 2D 类魂动作 RPG。掌握快节奏战斗，击败强大的敌人，收集稀有神器，并打造属于你的角色构筑，在变得更强的同时挑战致命的 Boss。

items.title: O.B.O.L Demo
items.short_description: Play a high stake game of head or tails against a mysterious opponent, trapped under the ocean in a claustrophobic, eldritch, Lovecraftian horror atmosphere, all while slowly losing your sanity.

items.title: Avelins Journey Demo
items.short_description: Stranded on a mysterious alien world, you must climb ever higher through a surreal parkour of floating ruins, ancient structures, and magical forces. Every fall costs time. Every move requires skill. How fast can you reach the top?

items.title: FootBall Card Battle Demo
items.short_description: 一款实时策略足球卡牌游戏，你将直接对抗对手。构建战术，用魔法卡强化球员，并在对手之前打入5个进球。每个决定都很重要——管理体力和有限卡牌以赢得胜利。

items.title: Code-Black Demo
items.short_description: A First-Person Single-Player Zombie Survival game where you, "Rugir J.z" live through the initial events of a mass zombie outbreak, shoot, kill, upgrade, explore. Do you think you can survive, or possibly escape…

items.title: Endwell Demo
items.short_description: One determined cat, one big backpack, and a whole lot of deliveries to make! As a Cat Courier, it's your job to deliver packages across a cozy town on the eve of the world's end. Help residents find connection, hope, and meaning before the last sunset.

items.title: Cloudrooms Demo
items.short_description: 你被困在一个悬浮在云层之上的走廊中。在这条走廊尽头有一扇门，探索一个每次开启都会变化的环境，识别异常，使用警报，并打破循环。

items.title: BREKEKEKEX Demo
items.short_description: Hunt frogs, clash with cultists, and survive close-range arena combat in this short, skill-driven swamp adventure.

items.title: Brazen Demo
items.short_description: Wield ancient elemental power in this first-person rogue-like and descend into a cursed labyrinth of escalating chaos, deadly spellcraft, and brutal ritual combat.

items.title: Backrooms Protocol Demo
items.short_description: Backrooms Protocol Demo is a walk simulator designed to showcase the atmosphere and environments of the full game. It contains three different levels to explore, each featuring its own unique atmosphere.

items.title: Sunrise Isles Demo
items.short_description: Drive goods, chop wood, catch fish, cook food, design clothes, or just chill in a spacious island with your friends!

items.title: Lab 1995 Demo
items.short_description: A psychological narrative horror game where you explore an abandoned government lab while an AI imitating your father guides you.. Would you rather sit quiet OR discover the truth with Noah!!!

items.title: Bar Simulator Demo
items.short_description: This demo contains a limited portion of the full game experience. Additional content, features, bar types, and systems will be available in the full release.

items.title: Watch Yo Plane Demo
items.short_description: 与好友一起驾驶一架混乱失控的飞机！在这款合作向“折磨游戏”中齐心协力，穿越重重障碍，挑战各种小游戏，看看你们的默契究竟能走多远。

items.title: My Favorite Store Simulator Demo
items.short_description: Start with a small shop and work your way up to a huge supermarket! Manage prices, serve customers, catch thieves, hire staff, and much more. Play solo or in co-op with up to 4 players.

items.title: Launch Them All Demo
items.short_description: A high-stakes turn-based missile duel where every shot matters. Spy, bluff, and deploy powerful tactical abilities to destroy enemy military assets while avoiding civilian casualties.

items.title: S4NCTU4RY Demo
items.short_description: 坐落在赛博朋克都市中心的酒吧——S4NCTU4RY。 外面的世界喧嚣、疲惫、永不停歇。你的工作是在这片混沌中提供一处栖息的避风港，调制出那杯能让人们暂时忘却一切的佳酿。

items.title: La Cosa Nostra Demo
items.short_description: La Cosa Nostra is a story-driven 2.5D side-scrolling action game set in 1920s America. Play as an immigrant navigating the world of organized crime, combining melee combat and shooter gameplay within a gritty mafia-themed narrative.

items.title: 星渊勇者 StarAbyss Heroes Demo
items.short_description: 《星渊勇者》是一款类暗黑类型的冒险刷宝动作游戏，玩家将作为“星陨之灾”后的幸存者，在探索和战斗的过程中逐步发现这场灾难背后的真相。玩家可以扮演不同风格的角色，在战斗中爆出各式各样的独特装备，并借助各种有深度的辅助功能构建出专属于自己的流派！（官方QQ群 297937881）

items.title: 仙岛丹田 Demo
items.short_description: 这是一款模拟建造类型的游戏。你将扮演一个掌管天空之岛的管理员，你需要在这片原始的岛屿上种植、建造、冶炼、采集，获得拥有神秘力量的仙丹，你交易这些仙丹获得更丰富的资源，并将这个岛屿建设的更加美好。

items.title: Forest of Deceit Demo
items.short_description: 风暴将至。如果不能在接下来的数日里建成避难所，你们一群人就都会丧命于此。但这片森林似乎被诅咒一般，已经让你的几个朋友变得疯狂、丧失了心智。如今他们的唯一目的就是害死你们其余所有人。来《密林疑云》这款社交推理游戏里，找出是谁背叛了团体吧。本游戏支持4-8人共同游玩。

items.title: Liminal:Childhood Memories Demo
items.short_description: 厌倦了成年人灰暗的现实，一个21岁的年轻人醒来时发现自己回到了被遗忘的过去。《Childhood Memories》是一款没有解谜元素的忧郁探索体验，由“阈限空间”与“Kenopsia”的怀旧氛围所驱动。这里没有怪物，只有回忆。

items.title: The Money Pit Demo
items.short_description: 尝试在一场扭曲的电视节目中活下去：收集宝藏、偷窃其他参赛者，并在怪物或对手击倒你之前存入战利品。只有最富有的史莱姆，才能活到明天。

items.title: Miss Rosen's Wowtastic! Marching Band Demo
items.short_description: The band is in town, and it’s time for some fun! Join Miss Rosen, a clockwork majorette escaped from her music box, as she travels the world solving mind-bending puzzles that’ll allow you to put things where they belong!

items.title: Koatl The Defender ULTIMATE Demo
items.short_description: 在《Koatl The Defender ULTIMATE》中，深入墨西哥圣路易斯波托西市地下隐藏的隧道。揭开远古秘密，挥舞强大武器，在融合 2.5D 平台跳跃与 3D 战斗的电影式动作冒险中挑战史诗级首领。

items.title: Among Us Story: On Guard Demo
items.short_description: Live life as a Crewmate in this dangerous narrative adventure through space. As Guard, you're in charge of shipwide security and everything is fine. Until there's a MURDER?! Prove your innocence before the Impostor gets to the rest of the crew... and you.

items.title: Dust Front RTS Demo
items.short_description: Dust Front is a classic RTS with 4X/grand strategy elements. In this demo, you will try out the RTS side: lead a triumphant siege of an industrial city. Command strike groups and crush one of two enemy factions.

items.title: Witchworker Demo
items.short_description: Study hard, keep your atelier tidy and cast magical spells.

items.title: Super Slots Demo
items.short_description: An incremental combo-chasing casino builder about rigging a tiny slot machine into a jackpot-printing empire.

items.title: Dreadline Express Demo
items.short_description: Dreadline Express 是一款第一人称心理恐怖类银河恶魔城游戏，背景设定在最后一列人类列车上。揭开这列神秘列车的谜团，直面诡异的乘客，并通过独特的卡牌叙事机制塑造你的旅程，完全掌控故事走向。这已不再是我们的世界。

items.title: One Song, One Life Demo
items.short_description: 【DEMO Ver.】《One Song, One Life（一曲一生）》是一款带来全新体验的节奏冒险游戏，敲击不同类型的音符，“乐曲”和“故事”的走向会产生变化。在游戏中，你将通过演奏，改变一名女孩（纯恋酱／雾岛纯恋）的人生。她正努力成为一名顶尖的网络音乐人，只为有朝一日能与喜欢的偶像同台演出。

items.title: Flock Off! Demo
items.short_description: 《羊群大逃亡！》是一款支持 1-4 名玩家的第一人称动作冒险游戏。与好友组队，在偏远的苏格兰高地，对抗一场诡异的羊群起义，努力求生。利用各种奇特的武器，抵御僵尸羊的攻击，并揭开意想不到的剧情转折。你们能否在这场羊群末日中幸存下来？

items.title: UFOntastic Demo
items.short_description: 杰诺有债要还，而最容易弄到钱的地方就是地球！使用你的飞碟：从环境中绑架物品、人、敌人等，在地牢和迷你游戏中不断前进，赚取财富！

items.title: Megaris Demo
items.short_description: A casual classic puzzle game with lots of modes and extras.

items.title: Hollow Ground Demo
items.short_description: Top-down shooter inspired by 90s arcade games. You and up to three friends play as four mercenaries as they descend into the Epsilon 9 bunker. Navigate 70+ handcrafted labyrinthine levels, purchase upgrades, and destroy chaos manifest: The Machine.

items.title: Furry Adventure Club and the Temple of Pawsion 🐱 Demo
items.short_description: 🐱 与 Indica 和她的兽耳伙伴们一起踏上全新的冒险！「爪与激情神殿」中充满了秘密、谜题，以及在最意想不到的地方邂逅爱情的机会。现在是加入 Furry Adventure Club 的时候了。

items.title: Protocol:Terminate Demo
items.short_description: 一款合作生存恐怖射击游戏，玩家需对抗通过学习玩家行为来进化的AI。它会变得越来越危险，不懈追击玩家，并将错误转化为致命陷阱。玩家需要躲藏、破解安防系统并协同作战才能生存。

items.title: INTO THE AETHER Demo
items.short_description: The first half of INTO THE AETHER: Chapter 1! Explore the magical oceanside town of Starry Hill, and meet the magic users that live within it...

items.title: Haunted Bar Simulator 🍻 Demo
items.short_description: Run a cozy bar with friends by day. Serve strange customers and survive the horror by night.

items.title: BOMBANANA! Demo
items.short_description: 你们是一支由三只猴子组成的3人拆弹小队：盲猴、聋猴和哑猴。在你们改造成移动拆弹工坊的小型厢式车里，你们必须在有限时间和有限沟通条件下，在炸弹爆炸前完成拆除！

items.title: Oreguard Demo
items.short_description: A mining, building and resource managing game. Get to upgrade your gear as you fulfill contracts and discover all kinds of minerals and resources. Not the final version.

items.title: RED FLAG Demo
items.short_description: A global catastrophe has struck the world. A small group of survivors is trapped in an isolated shelter with resources too scarce for everyone. Take your seat at the table, convince the others you deserve to stay. Lie, pressure, manipulate – and decide who gets thrown out!

items.title: Guardians Hand Demo
items.short_description: Harness the elemental powers of fire, wind, ice, and lightning to enhance your defensive turrets and hold back relentless waves of enemies. Strategically build your deck and adapt your tactics to survive increasingly challenging encounters.

items.title: Liminal Agent Demo
items.short_description: A psychological liminal space horror experience set across surreal backrooms, empty shopping malls, endless tunnels, retro locations and haunting hotels. Something is always watching you.

items.title: Trader's Life: Medieval Shop Demo
items.short_description: Step behind the counter in an immersive medieval trading simulation. Buy low, haggle hard, and sell high! Upgrade gear at the blacksmith, infuse your goods with elemental magic, and research new skills to transform your humble stall into the realm's most famous marketplace.

items.title: Playback
items.short_description: 一款心理恐怖游戏。你将探索一栋闹鬼的建筑，观看被诅咒的VHS录像带，解开谜题，并在模糊了记忆与现实界限的恐怖超自然事件中努力求生。

items.title: Click Roulette Demo
items.short_description: Click Roulette 是一款点击游戏，每一次尝试都可能让你付出生命。点击越多，风险越高，奖励也越大。权衡概率、升级、下注，并智胜其他玩家。受《Sin City》启发的黑暗黑色电影风格。懂得冒险的人才能获胜。

items.title: 盒体派对 Demo
items.short_description: Cube Party is a 2-8 player co-op puzzle and adventure game! Team up with friends, stack your box characters into walls, solve puzzles, overcome obstacles, and find the key to clear 40+ unique levels!

items.title: Mobius Demo
items.short_description: 如果空间没有终点，出路又在何方？《Mobius》是一款带你打破常规认知、宛如穿行于无尽循环中的几何解谜游戏。穿过屏幕边缘以颠倒重力，在中心对称的空间中寻找视角的盲区。解开物理机关，一步步抵达“门”的另一侧——而门后等待着你的，究竟是什么？

items.title: Grandma's Golden Boy: Sheep Shear Madness Demo
items.short_description: 抢先感受你未来冒险的起点！在免费试玩版中，试着修剪各种不同的绵羊，解锁升级，并建造一台酷炫的纺车吧！

items.title: ZipRush: Surf the Void Demo
items.short_description: Experience the single-player adrenaline of VR parkour racing. Build, upload, and download custom tracks, master multi-surface movement, and compete on the global leaderboards in this feature-limited Demo.

items.title: Unbelievers Demo
items.short_description: A psychological horror FPS where time fractures between 1986 and an alternate 1919. Fight nightmarish creatures, uncover a dark conspiracy, and struggle to reclaim your place in time.

items.title: Forensics: Crime Scene Detective Demo
items.short_description: 在真实的犯罪实验室模拟器中成为法医专家。调查犯罪现场，收集微观证据，并在实验室中通过DNA和数字分析识别犯罪者。基于莱茵兰-普法尔茨州刑事警察局（LKA RLP）专家的经验与见解。

items.title: Pact Warden Demo
items.short_description: As a Marchwarden, you travel the southern roads to protect pilgrims and travelers. You will fight multi-phased bosses, shape the storylines of characters, and explore an interconnected world.

items.title: Viscereality Demo
items.short_description: Visual novel in crystal punk genre, In the recent past, humans discovered a new mineral—Visceralite. Its unique feature lies in its ability to integrate with the human body.

items.title: Stack Up Demo
items.short_description: A multiplayer tactical shooter focused on realistic weapon handling and special forces tactics. Work with your team, master authentic firearm mechanics, and fight through intense close-quarters combat across multiple game modes.

items.title: VoidHue Demo
items.short_description: 《VoidHue》是一款俯视角解谜游戏，将经典的推箱子玩法与色彩斑斓的光影机制完美融合。你需要为物体上色、混合光线并匹配颜色，以此来破解各式各样的炫彩谜题。将红、蓝、黄三原色融合，可以调配出紫、橙、绿等间色，从而激活对光线有反应的机关

items.title: Our Wonderland Demo
items.short_description: A horror-fantasy visual novel following the trials of a dysfunctional friend group thrust back into the wish-granting wonderland of their youth. Either they face the issues plaguing them or risk dying in horrific ways again… and again… and again.

items.title: Clay Crusade: Night of the Necromancer Demo
items.short_description: Hack N' Slash zombie survival horror game featuring a claymation art style set in fantasy world. Upgrade your arsenal and fight through hordes of zombies to stop the evil necromancer and return peace to the kingdom!

items.title: DUAL PROTOCOL: The Case of Eva & Miles Demo
items.short_description: 扮演特工Eva追踪线索，或扮演分析师Miles掌控全局。《Dual Protocol》是一款仅靠对话推进的非对称黑色解谜游戏。在看不到对方屏幕的情况下，结合彼此的数据，揭开Castellari谋杀案 confirm 背后真相。

items.title: Frutz Demo
items.short_description: Blast through five worlds, claim the Cosmic Gems, defeat Lord Zorkannan, and master every run in this fast arcade shooter.

items.title: Sol One Demo
items.short_description: A grounded open-world survival crafting game where you're stranded alone on Mars. Explore the red planet, extract resources, build a pressurized base, manage oxygen, power, and food, and construct the rocket that's your only way home.

items.title: Procelio Demo
items.short_description: Procelio is a multiplayer vehicle builder/shooter set amidst a proxy war on the red planet. Build and refine your custom machines from orbit, then pilot them in a distant war against CPU and enemy players.

items.title: Stick A Round Demo
items.short_description: 在《Stick A Round》中重温童年的快乐！ 寻找独一无二生成的木棍，它们会根据真实形状变成武器。与好友开战，体验紧张刺激或轻松休闲的小游戏，并探索一个不断变化的世界——在这里，想象力就是规则。

items.title: Truck Simulator 2026: USA Demo
items.short_description: Step into the driver’s seat in Truck Simulator 2026: USA Demo! 🚚 Drive across selected American highways, haul cargo, experience realistic trucks, and get a first look at building your transport empire. 🌎

items.title: Rogue Kingdom Demo
items.short_description: 一个持续模拟、彼此相连的在线 Roguelike。你的行动会留在世界里：占下地下城、安置 NPC、守住据点。单人或和好友一起刷掉落、采矿、制作、放魔法、升级，深入怪怪的深层，遇见其他冒险者。

items.title: A Lighthouse Tale Demo
items.short_description: Return to the island of your childhood and relive fragments of your lost memories. Discover what your grandfather wanted you to remember.

items.title: Golden Hand Demo
items.short_description: 进入危险的探索区域，回收黄金与珍贵遗物，并活着返回的合作恐怖游戏。 你可以与其他玩家合作，也可以为了获得更多金钱而选择背叛。 越深入、越危险的地方，等待你的奖励也就越丰厚。

items.title: GRID_HACKER Demo
items.short_description: Guide your signal to the target while hacking into the grid network. Challenge your mind with 26 puzzles while accompanied by an immersive original soundtrack.

items.title: 驱灵天师 Demo
items.short_description: 一款融合国风民俗、神话志怪的多人联机PVE搜打撤游戏，你将化身神通各异的天师使用各类法宝，符箓，道具，完成各类民俗事件任务，与队友探索被邪祟入侵的场景降妖捉鬼，收集物资道具宝物，诛灭各路妖魔鬼怪，体验沉浸式中式除祟冒险。

items.title: Room Craft Demo
items.short_description: Room Craft 是一款创意模拟游戏，让您可以将梦想中的房间变为现实。使用各种家具、装饰品和室内细节设计独特的空间。

items.title: Oops Unit Demo
items.short_description: Oops Unit 是一款最多支持6人的在线合作游戏。解开谜题、收集资源，突破致命陷阱与敌人，拆除每一颗炸弹。活下来、购买新装备并重复任务——因为任何事物，甚至朋友，都可能破坏任务。

items.title: Yots Demo
items.short_description: 一款最多支持四名玩家的合作生存恐怖游戏。完成指标，与迷雾之城中的怪物战斗，并利用古代遗物打造独一无二的战斗流派。

items.title: ZAIBALY Demo
items.short_description: Horror-comedy boomer shooter, fantastic reimagining of a real-life experience of living under the constant threat of aerial assault.

items.title: Fix & Flick Demo
items.short_description: 恭喜！您已被选为今年 SICRED SYSTEMS 游戏周的负责人。您的任务是买卖和维修二手游戏机，同时管理您的店铺。服务顾客，发掘游戏机的秘密，完成您的各项职责。我们期待您的出色服务。

items.title: 让帝国再次伟大 Demo
items.short_description: 这是一款模拟经营+回合制自动战斗游戏。“黄昏末日”即将到来，帝国危在旦夕！您的子民需要裹腹的食物，体面的工作，最好再来点刺激的娱乐，但怪物们霸占着您的土地，掠夺着您的良田与矿产！拔剑吧，为帝国收复失地！建设吧，打造最繁华的帝国城市！子民们，不必害怕“黄昏”，因为新的“太阳”已经升起！

items.title: Tomboy Adventure 2 Demo
items.short_description: 和你的（女）朋友一起开始一段轻松的冒险吧！

items.title: HYPER DETONATOR Demo
items.short_description: HYPER DETONATOR is a chain-reaction bullet hell shooter set in cyberspace. Blast through the virus spreading across the mainframe, and detonate bombs to set off devastating chain reactions. How long will you survive?

items.title: Stuck in the Sewers Demo
items.short_description: Stuck in the Sewers is a chill puzzle game about finding your way out in a maze of pipes.

items.title: Limerence Demo: Gen's Story
items.short_description: A side story from Genevieve's perspective. A branching narrative about having fun with an AI companion...

items.title: Dirty Laundry Demo
items.short_description: Unable to hold down a job, Emily tries her luck on the night shift at a local laundromat. However, what starts as an ordinary job quickly turns into a nightmare as bizarre customers arrive, and the dark secrets of one particularly suspicious nightly visitor change her life forever.

items.title: The Burning Owl Demo
items.short_description: Michael Clow is a freelance photographer living a quiet life in his childhood home. Troubled by his strange and creepy neighbor, he starts noticing unusual things. As he looks deeper into what's going on, he discovers secrets that were never meant to be found.

items.title: Save Our Queen Demo
items.short_description: 一款短小的递进式点击游戏，你将击败怪物并保护女王之塔。

items.title: 超翼战骑 ESTIQUE 试玩版
items.short_description: 精彩刺激、超燃刺激、超耐看的防御战！ 诞生于21世纪的终极8位元射击游戏《超翼战骑 ESTIQUE》现已登陆Steam！

items.title: Ascend6 Demo
items.short_description: Scoundrel meets Poker in this score-attacking roguelike card game! Multiple classes to choose from. Buy unique skills, equip game-altering items, and conquer the round!

items.title: Last Drone War Demo
items.short_description: 你输掉了战争。驾驶 FPV 无人机、直升机和战斗机，释放毁灭性的火力——成为现代战争中真正的王牌。

items.title: Tavrik Demo
items.short_description: A hex-grid deckbuilding roguelite where every card you play reshapes the land beneath your feet. Lay roads, raise bridges, outrun storms and wolves, and push one more hex before your energy runs out. The journey is the dungeon.

items.title: Banana Life Sim Demo
items.short_description: Banana Life Sim is a game in which you can become a banana.

items.title: The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian Demo
items.short_description: 本作是一款剧情向角色扮演类游戏，故事围绕着圣阿卡尼亚帝国的王储展开。你掌握着巨大的权力，但也肩负着责任。你能否在坚持自我的同时改变世界？每个决定都将付出相应的代价。

items.title: BRAMBLEFORT Demo
items.short_description: BRAMBLEFORT is a VR survival horror game built for exploration, immersion, and weighty combat. Journey through a desolate North Atlantic island, where rotting huts gradually give way to towering Victorian mansions as you make your way toward its center.

items.title: Hitchhiking to Hell Demo
items.short_description: 在空荡荡的道路上搭便车旅行，每辆车都可能成为你的救赎……或者你的终点。走过荒凉的地方，一路上遇到奇异的陌生人。随着路边杀手的谣言不断传播，在不可预知的遭遇中交谈、做出决定并生存下来。在奔向未知的同时。

items.title: Thanks for the Soup Demo
items.short_description: The job's simple: Go around town and satisfy your customers with some nice and hot soup. Hop on your bicycle and go around town, make some money, buy items, take care of your cat, and much more in this immersive horror simulator.

items.title: Crime: 1997 Demo
items.short_description: Newport, 1997. Waterside gang member Henry Gallagher is thrust into a lethal spiral after a failed deal. Trapped between a police crackdown and the Sorvino Mafia, Henry must navigate a city ignited by "Pulse"—a volatile new drug turning every street into a warzone.

items.title: Cat Life Simulator Demo
items.short_description: Cat Life Simulator Demo is a realistic simulation game that allows you to see the world through the eyes of a cat. This demo version lets you explore part of the world, interact with the environment, and start creating your own cat’s story.

items.title: Astracolypse Demo
items.short_description: Astracolypse is a survival-driven, turn-based RPG set on a hostile alien desert world where exiled humans must hunt, feed, and fight to survive. Build a party of outcasts, manage an ever-growing hunger, and uncover the truth behind a world that hunts you on sight.

items.title: The Last of RAM Demo
items.short_description: Play the demo of The Last of RAM, a fast-paced first-person action game about a gamer girl fighting through robots, drones, and security systems to get RAM for her dream PC.

items.title: 动物小超市（试玩版）
items.short_description: 在屏幕底部经营一家由可爱动物打理的温馨放置类超市。生产商品、补货上架、实现店铺自动化、招聘员工，并不断扩展你的小小超市。

items.title: Bonki D Bonk Demo
items.short_description: 杀穿无尽怪物波次，拾取战利品，不断升级并叠加强力强化，组出在屏幕清掉你之前先清掉全屏的疯狂Build

items.title: Booty Demo
items.short_description: Booty's a swashbuckling, arcade-y 2D platformer game with Rocket Jumping at its core! Aim, charge, jump, shoot and fly across many islands! Loot treasure, blast enemies and climb to the top! Destroy blocks, speedrun through stages, increase your bounty and unlock gameplay-altering curses! Demo Ver!

items.title: Masters of Mayhem Demo
items.short_description: A vibrant social‑deduction with roguelike twists, wild abilities, monsters, and nonstop mayhem.

items.title: Blood Moon Serenade: Complete Edition Demo
items.short_description: Enter the secret world of vampire aristocracy in this otome visual novel. Read, choose, and shape your heroine’s fate in the Complete Edition, including all three Blood Moon Serenade titles.

items.title: Depth:Origin Demo
items.short_description: Battle against "music" in a rhythm x shooting x adventure game. To quell the cursed object "Depth Origin," which has been reported to devour people, play a game within a game and uncover the "truth" hidden within the cursed object.

items.title: The Mound: Omen of Cthulhu Demo
items.short_description: 最多可四人合作，组建探险者小队，踏上寻宝之旅。这片被诅咒的丛林危机四伏，怪物扭曲了现实。保持冷静，在丛林吞噬你之前征服它……...

items.title: BUDGE Demo
items.short_description: A co-op movement game. Lift heavy golden offerings to a mighty altar and please the gods, or simply ride along as your friends do all the lifting. Falling often is part of the journey. Success comes from picking yourself back up and mastering coordination.

items.title: Edge of Memories Demo
items.short_description: Avaris 的人口正遭受 Corrosion 的肆虐，这是一种可怕的瘟疫，会将所有感染者突变成诡异的怪物。扮演年轻的游牧者 Eline，与盟友并肩作战，共同拯救世界免于毁灭。

items.title: Island Wolves Demo
items.short_description: You are a wolf. Hunt prey and gather materials to build your camp, decorate your den and grow your pack. Fight off rival wolves or avoid combat altogether by using the environment to your advantage. Explore the islands and discover the truth behind the lost packs.

items.title: Outpath VR Demo
items.short_description: An experimental VR base building game. Craft, gather & manage resources, build your base and buy more islands to exploit and expand!

items.title: Real Car Market Simulator Together Demo
items.short_description: Start from nothing and build your own car trading empire in Real Car Market Simulator Together Demo. Buy, inspect, negotiate, repair, and sell vehicles solo or with up to 4 players. Every deal is a risk, and only smart teamwork leads to profit in this Demo.

items.title: Paw Pew Pew Demo
items.short_description: A fast-paced 3D roguelike shooter set in a world where nature and hostile technology violently collide. Customize your heroes with unique professions, collect devastating weapons, and adapt your build each run to rescue your friends from the Robo-Beast army!
developers: PT Sangnila Interaktif Media dan Teknologi
publishers: PT Sangnila Interaktif Media dan Teknologi

items.title: Prison Life Sim 2026 - Survival Demo
items.short_description: Survive the harsh reality of prison life in Prison Life Sim 2026 - Survival Demo. Manage resources, build relationships, sneak, fight, and make choices that shape your fate in a world where every decision matters in this Demo

items.title: Crococo
items.short_description: An urban legend says there are alligators living in the sewers of New York. Go down there… and see for yourself. A 90s-style comedy horror game featuring classic single-voice VHS dubbing.

items.title: SUMMER ROAD 10-Minute Auto Roguelite DEMO
items.short_description: 10分钟就能享受的Roguelite RPG。 “自动战斗” × “换装” × “Roguelite”

items.title: Airport Manager Simulator 2026 Demo
items.short_description: Take full control of a busy international airport in this Demo. Manage passengers, baggage, aircraft servicing, and flight schedules while operating real ground equipment. Balance efficiency, safety, and satisfaction in a fast-paced aviation experience. ✈️

items.title: Budget Renovation Simulator Demo
items.short_description: Turn "Trash" into "Cash" in Budget Renovation Simulator Demo! 💰 Buy a wrecked house, hunt for the cheapest materials, repair instead of replace, and maximize your profit. Experience the core mechanics of the full game and see if you can finish the renovation without going broke.

items.title: You Within Me
items.short_description: Indie single-player 2D narrative-driven yandere horror game with hide-and-seek and puzzle-solving mechanisms, as well as multiple endings. After unknowingly and unintentionally gaining the romantic attention of an unhinged individual, will you survive, or will you be... consumed?

items.title: The 4 Masked Demo
items.short_description: A 4-player co-op FPS adventure where you swing through trees using vines, escape wild animals, and survive dangerous biomes. Each player has a unique role, and teamwork is the key to survival.

items.title: PACOSTEP Demo
items.short_description: PacoStep is a hardcore platformer set in a tree world consumed by darkness. Join Paco, the last surviving spirit, and explore the ruined forest to uncover the source of corruption and reveal the truth hidden in this dying world.

items.title: Excalibur's Swordstone Idle Forge Demo
items.short_description: Excalibur's Swordstone Idle Forge is a cozy little medieval clicker with a big appetite. You're a blacksmith pulling legendary swords from stones, handing them to knights, and stacking gold higher and higher

items.title: 鹰派大统领 Demo
items.short_description: 好评如潮的《时空叛客》制作组最新力作！在这款动作肉鸽游戏中，你将挑战邪恶的现任总统！白天，建设基地、争取选票；夜晚，化身西装暴徒，深入敌后，击溃犯罪组织，拯救毛茸茸的外星生物。随心搭配数十种异能与武器，在千变万化的关卡中构筑你的专属流派！

items.title: MOLE
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 129 篇用户评测中有 96% 为好评。
items.short_description: 驾驶战后打造的钻地巨兽——“鼹鼠号”钻探船，深入斯拉夫地底。修复系统故障，追随亡者的呼唤，与同处这具“深渊铁棺”中的未知存在对峙，祈祷自己能活下来。在这地底深处，率先崩溃的，究竟会是这钻地铁躯，还是你自己？

items.title: Crunchy Bear: Dig Dig Pals Demo
items.short_description: 养一只脆饼熊吧，它正等着陪你一起上班！ 你每按下一个按键，脆饼熊就会跟着敲敲桌面。打字、点击、玩游戏还是工作，全都会变成它的收获。 快来看看脆饼熊今天又挖到了什么好东西！

items.title: Floppy Desk Demo
items.short_description: Try the core Floppy Desk match experience for free: a fast retro card game about matching colors, numbers, and wild specials. Play solo against bots or online with friends on a neon desktop.

items.title: We’re In Trouble Demo
items.short_description: A CO-OP stealth game about a problem that can’t wait until morning. 🕵️‍♂️ An empty office, a body, and absolute silence. Work together, avoid guards and cameras, handle unpredictable physics, and escape unnoticed. One mistake can ruin everything in this Demo.

items.title: Hello Operator Demo
items.short_description: Zài zhè kuǎn fēnwéi nónghòu, jùqíng fēngfù de xuányí yóuxì zhōng, bànyǎn bù lì sī wéi'ěr wéiyī de jiēxiànyuán. Zài hūn'àn de jiēxiànyuán xíwèi shàng, jiētīng diànhuà, jiāntīng tōnghuà, jiē kāi zhèn mín zhī jiān jiūchán de mìmì, yǐjí tāmen lǐmào wèizhuāng xià de hēi'àn.

items.title: SCP Foundation: Universe Horror Demo
items.short_description: Survive inside a secret SCP facility in this Demo. Explore dark corridors, avoid or confront anomalous entities, manage limited resources, and outsmart unpredictable AI to stay alive in a world where containment can fail at any moment.

items.title: Are We Sinking Yet? Demo
items.short_description: Are We Sinking Yet? Demo is a chaotic co-op rafting game for 2-4 players where teamwork is the only way to survive. Paddle together to steer your raft, dodge dangerous river obstacles, solve environmental puzzles, and try not to throw your friends overboard in this Demo.

items.title: Noire Police Detective: Gangster Drama Simulator Demo
items.short_description: Investigate a deadly conspiracy in Noire Police Detective: Gangster Drama Simulator Demo. Search for clues, sneak through dangerous locations, solve environmental puzzles, and make choices that shape the fate of a corrupt 1950s border city in this Demo.

items.title: Mosaica: Goblin Girl Demo
items.short_description: 轻松视觉小说 • 放置点击 • 益智 RPG 走进一个充满奇趣、Cozy 氛围与治愈美学的奇幻故事。

items.title: 8 Ball Pool: Play Together Demo
items.short_description: Step into a lively bar and experience classic 8-ball pool in 8 Ball Pool: Play Together Demo. Play locally with friends, challenge players online, or test your skills against AI. Master realistic mechanics, manage your cue with the chalk system, and rise through the ranks to unlock new customization

items.title: Formic Fortress Demo
items.short_description: Formic Fortress is a local co-op tower defense party game with rogue-like elements. Scavenge and throw blocks to build your anthill and fend off waves of nasty bugs! Protect your queen, survive the swarm, and unleash the dormant strength of your ammo through powerful upgrades resetting every run.

items.title: Bloody Cleanup TOGETHER Demo
items.short_description: Clean up the aftermath of terrible events in Bloody Cleanup Together Demo, a co-op horror cleaning sim for up to 4 players. Remove blood, hide evidence, carry bodies, and restore every detail before anything is discovered in this Demo. 🩸

items.title: 孤岛求生指南试玩版
items.short_description: 与挚友合作生存，探索充满未知的海洋孤岛；伐木采矿、搜刮建造，通过战术分工打造出抵御暴风雨的温馨营地。面对黑夜海怪侵袭，和伙伴并肩战斗守卫家园！在喂养巨兽的温馨日常里，勇敢守护相依为命的巨龟伙伴，搜集迷失的动物神灵并供奉于图腾神庙，将孤岛改造成充满生机的移动避风港！

items.title: Greed Party Demo
items.short_description: Demo of a co-op party game where you collect coins, gamble for weapons in slot machines, and fight a boss together in a cursed world of greed.

items.title: Antidote Demo
items.short_description: 30 minutes. That is all the time you have left before the infection consumes you. Bitten and lost in the heart of a procedurally generated bunker, your only chance of survival is to locate and inject the antidote hidden within its depths. The countdown has begun.

items.title: Cozy Offroad Simulator Together Demo
items.short_description: Explore harsh wilderness together in Cozy Offroad Simulator Together, a relaxing co-op driving adventure where teamwork, smart preparation, and realistic offroad mechanics help you survive mud, snow, storms, and dangerous terrain 🚙🌲

items.title: Fractured Realms Demo
items.short_description: Train classic RPG skills, build and upgrade your own outpost, and progress through a handcrafted fantasy world in this idle-style, UI-driven pixel RPG inspired by RuneScape and Melvor Idle

items.title: Satawn Demo
items.short_description: Satawn aims for a more complete village life experience: farming, building, inventory, scene-based exploration, transitions between zones, day and night cycles, cinematics integrated into gameplay, and a task system ranging from simple requests to neighbors

items.title: Air Hockey: Magical Heroes Demo
items.short_description: A magical roguelite twist on air hockey! Battle forest animals, collect power-ups, and survive a series of intense air hockey matches.

items.title: 回圈Loop Demo
items.short_description: 你独自醒来于深海钻井平台，唯一的同伴是正在退化的 AI——LUMEN。20 分钟后，这里将化为火海。寻找线索，规划路线，逃出生天。死亡不是终点，记忆才是你唯一的武器。在这个关于孤独、时间与意识碎片的心理恐怖游戏中，每一次循环都让你离真相更近一步……但那真的是你想要的吗？

items.title: 宇宙丰收：无限成长 试玩版
items.short_description: 《宇宙丰收：无限成长》是一款轻松休闲的放置增量游戏，带你展开星际旅行。探索全新星球，收集稀有资源，发展科技，并不断解锁更多可能性！

items.title: 王国大战僵尸 试玩版
items.short_description: 《王国大战僵尸》是一款融合了策略、塔防和 Roguelike 元素的游戏，你将守卫自己的王国，抵御无穷无尽的亡灵大军。

items.title: 神威之境：第八位神 试玩版
items.short_description: 俯视角 肉鸽 自动战斗游戏，每位英雄都使用魔法阵作战。组合七位神明的力量构筑流派，解锁拥有稀有能力的角色，带领你的英雄穿越数百敌人的浪潮。

items.title: VeilStalker Demo
items.short_description: 一款支持单人和合作游玩的奇幻生存游戏。作为一名现代猎人，你被困在一个残酷而充满魔法的世界中。建造基地、搜寻稀缺弹药、猎杀传奇生物，并在巨型怪物、游荡亡灵和严酷环境的威胁下努力生存。

items.title: Wobble Mayhem Demo
items.short_description: Wobble Mayhem throws you into chaotic wobbling battles where staying on your feet is half the challenge. Funny physics control every move, turning fights into pure chaos. Throw enemies off the map, lose balance, or knock out teammates. Every match is unpredictable and never the same.

items.title: Cinema Manager Simulator Demo
items.short_description: 🎬 管理并扩展你的影院。升级设备、安排电影、设定票价、雇佣员工并处理维修，打造终极观影体验！ 🍿

items.title: Scratch the Ticket Demo
items.short_description: Scratch the Ticket 是一款围绕彩票刺激感展开的增量游戏。打印彩票，刮开格子，然后决定：现在收钱，还是赌上一切。结果只取决于你的选择。

items.title: Songtail: Whiskers of Destiny
items.short_description: You play as Felina Songblade, a whimsical bard who is invited to perform at various cozy and magical venues. Explore three distinct acts, meet a cast of colorful characters, and find out how to affect destinies through song. Featuring cute pixel art, quirky writing, and a lot of charm.

items.title: Hollowforge Demo
items.short_description: Manage an expedition of dwarves as they build out a colony under the surface in this incremental game. Assign your dwarves to farm food, forge runes, hunt trolls and mine ore!

items.title: Via Sudoku Demo
items.short_description: Sudoku is about logic, not guessing. Experience the classic puzzle in its purest form, enhanced by an interactive system that teaches you advanced techniques. Master logical patterns, use intuitive tools, and solve puzzles of any difficulty in a calm, minimalist atmosphere.

items.title: FEED IT Demo
items.short_description: A first-person, PSX-style horror game about living with a monster. Do as you're told... or don't. Just be ready for the (demo-sized) consequences.

items.title: Trivia Murder Party 3 Demo
items.short_description: Your favorite trivia-obsessed serial killer is heading to summer camp to put you through a sinister new set of minigames and murder. Take a stab at answering questions correctly, engage in luck and skill-based activities, and sabotage your fellow campers in order to survive the summer.

items.title: Key Clover
items.short_description: 键盘四叶草帮助你进入心流状态，小猫陪着你打字，每打一些字，你就能转动一次幸运机器，获得更多的金币！看看今天你能赚多少金币吧。每天关注你的金币和按键数，与全球玩家共同比拼谁更卷！

items.title: Frontiers Reach : Mercenaries Demo
items.short_description: Step into the shoes of a mercenary on the edge of human occupied space as you engage in an immersive world of survival, faction warfare, and a fight to stop an alien empire from destroying human life on the frontier of outer space.

items.title: Expandaball Demo
items.short_description: 球越大，挑战就越大。在这款令人上瘾的物理平台游戏中，利用熊猫的成长达到新的高度。

items.title: Unbound Pioneer Demo
items.short_description: 这是一个2D俯视角生存游戏，在游戏中，玩家将在一个丰富多彩又充满挑战的世界中生存下去，在不断的探索收集和合成建造中不断变强。探索矿洞，开采更强大材料，强化装备，探索遗迹，战胜强敌，获取宝藏，制作法杖，建造法术塔与领地，挑战维度入侵事件，获取更多更好的资源。还可以进一步建造一些自动化设施实现资源的高效获取、通过祭坛转换获取人物特殊能力、在无限可能性的各种独特维度穿梭并进一步掌控空间和资源。

items.title: 南京大屠杀：拉贝日记-Nanjing Massacre: John Rabe's Diary Demo
items.short_description: 这是一款以南京大屠杀真实历史为背景、基于约翰·拉贝人道主义事迹及其日记原文的文字互动类游戏。你将扮演德国商人约翰·拉贝，置身于南京安全区的绝境之中。每日面对的历史突发事件与沉重抉择，都将随着你的选择，化为纸面上字字泣血的日记篇章，你的笔触将直接决定千万中国难民的生死存亡。

items.title: GUTTED: Infested Crypts Demo
items.short_description: 深入被诅咒墓园下方遭虫灾侵蚀的地下墓穴，在这款充满冲击力的动作恐怖FPS中杀出生路。使用沉重而 brutal 的枪战、血腥肢解，对抗腐烂怪物，而你与黑暗之间只剩下一支濒临熄灭的手电筒。

items.title: Top Bins Demo
items.short_description: 一款放置类游戏，你需要射门击中移动球门来赢取金钉。用金钉进行强力升级，这样你就能获得更多金钉，并在任意球挑战中击败守门员 Boss，从而提升联赛等级！

items.title: Pizza Man Simulator Demo
items.short_description: 披萨烤焦了？直接用番茄酱淹没它！在你的餐厅里，把冷冻夏威夷披萨放进微波炉加热简直就是日常。服务挑剔的顾客、升级你的披萨店，并在厨房里即兴发挥。最重要的规则？没人食物中毒……而且钱要对得上。

items.title: CLAW - Cosmic Legendary Animal Warfare
items.short_description: Build modular ships, send them into autonomous battles, and survive through smart planning and resource management. Destroy enemy bases by outlasting their fleets and breaking their defenses with drones.

items.title: Corporate Entropy Demo
items.short_description: Climb the ladder while burning it down. In this satirical management sim, you work for a corporation rolling out ARIA — an AI that's replacing your coworkers. Balance your performance cover against quiet sabotage, organize your resistance, and survive 8 quarters with your soul mostly intact.

items.title: OIL.EXE
items.short_description: Drill the wells. Run the refinery. Read the market. OIL is a free text-based simulation of running a petroleum operation, played at a 1980s green-phosphor terminal. End each year richer or bankrupt. Mind the bear market. Climb the leaderboard.

potential_items.short_description: A simple game all about picking up a ball.

potential_items.title: WHERE the F$CK is my BITCOIN ⁉️
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 81 篇用户评测中有 83% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 你把Bitcoin弄丢了，它现在埋在垃圾场里。挖掘、收集、出售并升级。每一次发现都可能是垃圾……或改变一切的关键。

potential_items.title: 列车安全搜查官梨奈
potential_items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 163 篇用户评测中有 75% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 在这款肉鸽X模拟玩法的游戏里，你将扮演拥有超能力的特殊调查员梨奈，在列车里打击犯罪、降低犯罪率。通过升级并组合各种技能来先发制人吧！同时还能给梨奈换不同的衣服，享受各种造型带来的乐趣。

potential_items.title: Slice the Crops!
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 81 篇用户评测中有 87% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 切割、赚取、升级、循环。在这款令人上瘾的增量游戏中，尽情切割变异水果！消灭成群的独特变异作物，深入研究庞大的天赋树，解锁新关卡，并研发强大的水果突变，最大限度地提高您的收成，主宰整个农场。

potential_items.title: Melody's Escape 2
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 265 篇用户评测中有 95% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 化音乐为赛道，跑出你的专属节奏！《Melody》华丽回归，音频分析算法迎来史诗级提升。每一首MP3都能实时生成独一无二的谱面赛道，带给你与音乐节拍、强度完美同步的纯粹律动！

potential_items.title: Survival Machine
potential_items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 624 篇用户评测中有 71% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 在移动机器上建造你的基地，穿越拥有不同资源的生物群系，并为僵尸威胁远高于白天的夜晚做好准备。你会一个人去还是和你最好的朋友一起去探索这个新世界?

potential_items.title: IOSoccer
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 2,874 篇用户评测中有 81% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: IOSoccer is a free non-commercial competitive third-person online multiplayer soccer game that offers unparalleled freedom in ball control and gameplay depth.

potential_items.title: FeeBay Simulator
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 52 篇用户评测中有 90% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: Flip fake trading cards for real profit in FeeBay Simulator, a comedic marketplace tycoon game. Snipe underpriced cards from clueless and scammy sellers, grade your best pulls, crack open mystery lots, and run your own storefront to build a reselling empire.

potential_items.title: Don't Let It Starve
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 73 篇用户评测中有 97% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 恐怖+肉鸽+烹饪大混搭。你被困在地下的神秘厨房里，被迫制作便当、投喂一个口味相当刁钻的怪物。赌上性命、巧妙组合，去制作了不起的便当吧！无论如何，不能让怪物挨饿。

potential_items.title: Goblin Company
potential_items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 129 篇用户评测中有 77% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 作为 WHAAG MINING INC 的地精矿工，挖掘、铺设轨道并在地下求生。点亮前路，否则黑暗会榨干你的生命。探索完全可破坏的生物群系，对抗敌对生物，单人或在线合作猎取传说中的巨型金块

potential_items.title: 囚徒的柜台
potential_items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 183 篇用户评测中有 75% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 1980年，身处多事之秋的你好不容易获得了一份银行出纳员的工作。荒唐的政策、严苛的制度、难缠的上司，以及形形色色的客人成为了你每天所打交道的对象。这小小柜台既是避风港，也是修罗场，每日埋头于单据文件和处理交易的你究竟该如何扛起家庭的重担？自我良知和对待他人的善意，又能够在权力和金钱的诱惑面前坚持多久？

potential_items.title: 胶囊恋人
potential_items.review_summary: 好评如潮 此游戏的 585 篇用户评测中有 99% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 欢乐的治愈系视觉小说。不想内卷的自由职业者胡莱，住在胶囊宾馆过着与世无争的生活。直到某天，活泼开朗的少女阮小柒强行闯入了他的世界！于是，抽象纯情小辣妹和深藏不露躺平男的恋爱故事，就这样开始啦！

potential_items.title: 斗笠江湖
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 152 篇用户评测中有 99% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 《斗笠江湖》是一款 3D 硬派国风武侠 MMORPG，以明朝万历年间为背景，融合朝堂纷争与江湖恩怨，主打写实武侠画风与高自由度开放世界。游戏设有六大特色职业，采用无锁定即时战斗，浮空连招打击感强烈。核心包含侠客助战、装备养成、秘境探索等玩法，同时主打跨服团战、阵营对抗、公平竞技等强 PVP 内容。游戏福利丰厚，支持自由交易，整体偏向硬核养成与热血竞技，适合喜爱经典武侠 MMO 的成年玩家。

potential_items.title: 1.76复古沉默
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 66 篇用户评测中有 89% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 全新传奇《1.76复古沉默》，耗时两年精心雕琢，倾尽心血打造诚意巨献！以原创剧情为灵魂的基础上，它保留了传奇的核心玩法（打怪、升级、爆装备、攻沙巴克）超级大陆为舞台🌏，秉持“不肝不氪”的友好理念🥰、不同职业的多种流派等独具特色的新内容，让游戏体验既怀旧又新奇

potential_items.short_description: 在这款战术潜行游戏中，你将穿越到30年代的芝加哥，一个充满腐败和非法走私肉类的城市。你可扮演埃利奥特·内斯或他的小队成员，深入敌境。你需要巧妙运用声东击西、潜行躲藏等战术，暗中打击黑手党，最终摧毁阿尔·卡彭的犯罪帝国。准备行动, 让我们一起体验这场充满刺激和挑战的冒险吧！
